project_type: Next.js 16 website with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
test_framework: None - no test files present, validation via build success
verification_instructions: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim. All pages should compile without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node modules already installed.
contribution_requirements: Commit all changes on main branch. Do not push.
key_patterns: App Router (src/app/), component sections in src/components/sections/, Tailwind CSS with custom theme (navy/gold colors), framer-motion for animations, lucide-react for icons, Next.js Image component for images, unsplash for product images
directory_structure: src/app/ contains route pages (page.tsx per folder), src/components/ contains Navbar, Footer, and sections/ subfolder has homepage section components. public/ has logo files. Tailwind config uses custom navy/gold color palette.
